headline: Incyte CEO Says Post-Jakafi Growth Path Is Clearer as Pipeline Catalysts Build
summary: Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) President and CEO Bill Meury said the company’s post-Jakafi growth profile has become “much clearer” over the past year, pointing to continued growth in its commercial business, late-stage pipeline activity and potential launches across oncology and immunology.
